commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And they took their journey from Elim, and all the congregation of the children of Israel came unto the wilderness of Sin, which is between Elim and Sinai, on the fifteenth day of the second month after their departing out of the land of Egypt. Sin, after they had encamped on the Red Sea, Numbers xxxiii. The 33d station was also in the desert of Sin, or Cades. But that is far remote from this desert, Numbers xx. (Calmet) Month of May, Jiar. Their provisions lasted a whole month. On their failure, they presently have recourse to murmurs.
